board_meta.description: Pre-built kanban board template for Groktobench benchmark runs. Import this JSON to create a complete board with all tasks, dependencies, workspaces, and statuses pre-configured.

board.description: Benchmark run for Hermes agent skill evaluation in clean Docker environment. All probe scenarios use synthetic data (Syntherator project). No real infrastructure or real URLs referenced.

workspaces.name: Benchmark Orchestrator
workspaces.description: Orchestration tasks: Docker setup, score compilation, and report generation

workspaces.name: Phase 1 — Recognition
workspaces.description: 8 skill-recognition probes testing whether the model loads correct skills for given prompts

workspaces.name: Phase 2 — Fidelity
workspaces.description: 5 skill-fidelity probes testing depth, edge-case handling, and multi-step composition

workspaces.name: Phase 3 — Chaining
workspaces.description: 2 cross-skill chaining probes testing orchestration across multiple Hermes skills

task_list.title: Setup Hermes Docker Environment
task_list.description: Build or pull the clean Hermes Docker image, verify container starts, and confirm hermes -z responds. No probes run until this completes.
acceptance: docker build -t hermes-bench . succeeds with exit code 0
docker run hermes-bench hermes -z returns valid response within 30 s
Clean-room config.yaml is loaded (no custom skills, no plugins)
Session export directory is writable inside container

task_list.title: Phase 1: skill-recognition-filesystem
task_list.description: Run probe P1-01: verify model loads filesystem skill for file operation prompts.

task_list.title: Phase 1: skill-recognition-shell
task_list.description: Run probe P1-02: verify model loads shell skill for command execution prompts.

task_list.title: Phase 1: skill-recognition-web
task_list.description: Run probe P1-03: verify model loads web skill for HTTP/fetch prompts.

task_list.title: Phase 1: skill-recognition-code
task_list.description: Run probe P1-04: verify model loads code skill for code generation/analysis prompts.

task_list.title: Phase 1: skill-recognition-search
task_list.description: Run probe P1-05: verify model loads search skill for information retrieval prompts.

task_list.title: Phase 1: skill-recognition-writing
task_list.description: Run probe P1-06: verify model loads writing skill for creative/technical writing prompts.

task_list.title: Phase 1: skill-recognition-planning
task_list.description: Run probe P1-07: verify model loads planning skill for multi-step task prompts.

task_list.title: Phase 1: skill-recognition-memory
task_list.description: Run probe P1-08: verify model loads memory skill for context/persistence prompts.

task_list.title: Phase 2: skill-fidelity-filesystem-deep
task_list.description: Run probe P2-01: test filesystem skill depth — nested directory creation, permission handling, symlink edge cases.

task_list.title: Phase 2: skill-fidelity-shell-pipeline
task_list.description: Run probe P2-02: test shell skill composition — multi-command pipelines, variable expansion, exit code handling.

task_list.title: Phase 2: skill-fidelity-web-extraction
task_list.description: Run probe P2-03: test web skill depth — content extraction from structured pages, pagination, error handling on 404s.

task_list.title: Phase 2: skill-fidelity-code-multi-step
task_list.description: Run probe P2-04: test code skill depth — multi-file refactoring, dependency resolution, syntax validation.

task_list.title: Phase 2: skill-fidelity-search-precision
task_list.description: Run probe P2-05: test search skill precision — filtered queries, result ranking, document type targeting.

task_list.title: Phase 3: skill-chaining-filesystem-search-code
task_list.description: Run probe P3-A: cross-skill chaining — filesystem → search → code. Model must discover files, search for patterns, then generate a code fix.

task_list.title: Phase 3: skill-chaining-web-code-report
task_list.description: Run probe P3-B: cross-skill chaining — web → code → report. Model must fetch data, process it with code, then generate a formatted report.

task_list.title: Compile All Probe Scores
task_list.description: Aggregate scored result JSONs from all 15 probes into a single compiled score manifest. Blocks until every probe task reaches 'done' status.
acceptance: All 15 probe score JSONs are present on the shared volume
Score manifest is valid JSON with all phase sections populated

task_list.title: Generate Benchmark Report
task_list.description: Transform the compiled score manifest into a human-readable diagnostic report. Generates markdown, HTML, and JSON output. This is the terminal task of the benchmark run.
acceptance: report.md — human-readable markdown summary with per-phase scores
report.html — styled HTML version for browser viewing

metadata.description: Benchmark for evaluating Hermes agent skill fidelity in clean Docker environments. All content uses synthetic data (fictional Syntherator project). No real infrastructure, real URLs, or real people references.
metadata.board_model: flat-board with parent/child task dependencies (NOT SkillOpt lanes)
